subcodes.title: Words to Habib Mu'ayyad around June 1914
subcodes.first_line: Do you know why His Holiness the Exalted One [the Bab] was martyred and the Blessed Beauty sustained such life-long hardships and sufferings?... Is it rational for us to aid him? If a thief wants to enter a house and rob it, should we help him?
subcodes.first_line_orig: میدانی چرا حضرت اعلی شهید شد میدانی چرا جمال مبارک اینهمه بلاها را تحمل کرد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom
